message:
Initialize beads issue tracker for dependency-aware task management

Sets up the beads (bd) local-first issue tracker with initial
configuration and issue database. Includes tracking for upstream
fastmcp_rust VecDeque breaking change migration that affects this
repo's MCP transport call-sites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Beads Project Configuration
+# issue_prefix: bd
+# default_priority: 2
+# default_type: task

@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+{"id":"bd-chj","title":"fastmcp_rust breaking change: StreamableHttpTransport queue types switched to VecDeque","description":"Upstream fastmcp_rust introduced a breaking API change in StreamableHttpTransport queue helpers:

- request_queue(): Arc<Mutex<Vec<JsonRpcRequest>>> -> Arc<Mutex<VecDeque<JsonRpcRequest>>>
- response_queue(): Arc<Mutex<Vec<JsonRpcResponse>>> -> Arc<Mutex<VecDeque<JsonRpcResponse>>>

Why: dequeue operations were changed from O(n) Vec::remove(0) to O(1) VecDeque::pop_front for stream-load reliability.

Required migration in this repo:
1. Update explicit queue type annotations/imports to VecDeque.
2. Replace queue operations with VecDeque APIs (push_back, pop_front).
3. Re-run compile/tests for all MCP transport call-sites.

Reference upstream commit: 20ee715 in fastmcp_rust.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T17:38:55.024645921Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T17:38:55.024645921Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
